case_title: CONRADO, MARIA vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRADO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-22-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-23-1992 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-22-1992

STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRADO, MARIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONRADO, MARIA SERVED NOV-12-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONRADO, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORP $3,797.31 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,797.31
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
